name: Cisco Webex
description: This app integrates with Cisco Webex to implement investigative and genric actions

actions.name: Get User
actions.description: Get user ID from e-mail address

parameters.name: email_address
parameters.description: User webex e-mail address

actions.name: Send Message
actions.description: Send message to user or room

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: User or Room ID

parameters.name: destination_type
parameters.description: Destination Type

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message

parameters.name: is_markdown
parameters.description: Is the message Markdown formatted

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: A user-friendly name for the room

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: The description of the space

parameters.name: team_id
parameters.description: The ID for the team with which this room is associated

parameters.name: classification_id
parameters.description: The classification_id for the room

parameters.name: is_locked
parameters.description: Set the space as locked/moderated; creator becomes a moderator

parameters.name: is_public
parameters.description: If true, the room is discoverable by anyone in the org; description must be provided

parameters.name: is_announcement_only
parameters.description: Sets the space into announcement-only mode

actions.name: Add People
actions.description: Add a people to a Webex room (space) as a member or moderator

parameters.name: room_id
parameters.description: The ID of the room to add the person to

parameters.name: person_id
parameters.description: The ID of the person to add (use either person_id or person_email)

parameters.name: person_email
parameters.description: The email address of the person to add (use either person_email or person_id)

parameters.name: is_moderator
parameters.description: Set to true to make the person a room moderator

actions.name: Schedule Meeting
actions.description: Allows users to schedule a Webex meeting, webinar, or ad-hoc meeting

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Title of the meeting (max 128 chars)

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Meeting start time (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: Meeting end time (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: IANA time zone for the meeting (e.g., America/Los_Angeles)

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Meeting description (max 1300 chars)

parameters.name: invitees
parameters.description: List of emails to invite (comma‑separated)

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Password to join the meeting

parameters.name: send_email
parameters.description: Whether to email host & invitees

parameters.name: host_email
parameters.description: Host email (admin scopes required)

parameters.name: scheduled_type
parameters.description: Type of meeting: meeting, webinar, or personal_room_meeting

parameters.name: adhoc
parameters.description: Create an ad‑hoc (instant) meeting in a room

parameters.name: room_id
parameters.description: Room (space) ID for ad‑hoc meeting

parameters.name: recurrence
parameters.description: Meeting series rule (RFC‑2445, e.g. FREQ=DAILY;INTERVAL=1)

parameters.name: session_type_id
parameters.description: Session type ID (required for webinars)

parameters.name: enabled_auto_record_meeting
parameters.description: Automatically record when meeting starts

parameters.name: allow_any_user_to_be_co_host
parameters.description: Allow any qualified user to be cohost

parameters.name: enabled_join_before_host
parameters.description: Allow attendees to join before host

parameters.name: join_before_host_minutes
parameters.description: Minutes attendees can join before host (0,5,10,15)

parameters.name: enable_connect_audio_before_host
parameters.description: Allow audio connect before host

parameters.name: enable_automatic_lock
parameters.description: Automatically lock the meeting after start

parameters.name: automatic_lock_minutes
parameters.description: Minutes after start to auto‑lock

parameters.name: public_meeting
parameters.description: List on public calendar

parameters.name: reminder_time
parameters.description: Minutes before start to send host reminder

parameters.name: unlocked_meeting_join_security
parameters.description: How non‑invitees join: allowJoin, allowJoinWithLobby, blockFromJoin

actions.name: Retrieve Meeting Participants
actions.description: Retrieve all participants in an in-progress or ended Webex meeting

parameters.name: meeting_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the meeting (not personal room meeting)

parameters.name: breakout_session_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of a breakout session in an ended meeting

parameters.name: meeting_start_time_from
parameters.description: Start time to filter meetings (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: meeting_start_time_to
parameters.description: End time to filter meetings (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: host_email
parameters.description: Email address of the meeting host (admin-only use)

parameters.name: join_time_from
parameters.description: Start of participant join time range (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: join_time_to
parameters.description: End of participant join time range (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of participants to return (1–100)

actions.name: List Messages
actions.description: Retrieve a list of messages from a Webex room or 1:1 conversation

parameters.name: room_id
parameters.description: The ID of the room to list messages from

parameters.name: parent_id
parameters.description: List messages in a thread by parent message ID

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: List messages sent before a specific date/time (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: before_message
parameters.description: List messages sent before a specific message ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of messages to return (default 50, max 100)

actions.name: Get Message Details
actions.description: Retrieve the details of a specific Webex message by message ID

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the message to retrieve

actions.name: Get Meeting Details
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific Webex meeting using meeting ID or meeting number

parameters.name: meeting_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the meeting being requested (UUID format)

parameters.name: host_email
parameters.description: Email address of the meeting host (for admin-level access)

parameters.name: current
parameters.description: Whether to retrieve only the current scheduled meeting of the series (true or false)

actions.name: List Users
actions.description: List users in your Webex organization using filters like email, name, ID, roles, or location

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter people by email address

parameters.name: display_name
parameters.description: Filter people whose name starts with this string

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of person IDs to retrieve (max 85)

parameters.name: org_id
parameters.description: List users in this organization (admin only)

parameters.name: roles
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of role IDs to filter by (admin only)

parameters.name: calling_data
parameters.description: Whether to include Webex Calling data (admin only)

parameters.name: location_id
parameters.description: List users present in this location (admin only)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of people to return (default 100, max varies based on flags)

actions.name: Get Recording Details
actions.description: Retrieve details of a Webex meeting recording using its recording ID

parameters.name: recording_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the Webex recording.

parameters.name: meeting_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the Webex meeting.

parameters.name: host_email
parameters.description: Email address of the meeting host (admin only).

actions.name: Ai Meeting Summary
actions.description: Retrieve AI-Generated meeting summary and actions items using its recording ID and site url

parameters.name: recording_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the Webex recording.

parameters.name: site_url
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the Webex recording.eg: company.webex.com
